prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot predict future stock prices. The point estimate is the current price, serving as a neutral baseline given the inherent unpredictability of the market. The confidence intervals are theoretical estimations based on a simplified model assuming an annualized volatility of 25% for TGT and a normal distribution of returns over 18 trading days (approximately 0.0714 years). These intervals indicate the range within which the price might fall with the specified probability, but actual market movements can deviate significantly due to unforeseen factors.
